original: You run, ducking and weaving, trying to lose her lock on you... but her scope is too good, automatically correcting for your every desperate move. Her shot slams into you with supernova force, sending you crashing into the nearest wall and knocking the wind right out of you!

original: “Ohh, you’re really puttin’ up a fight, aren’t ya?” the gryvain sneers, reaching for the little belt strapped to her tail. “Didn’t your mother ever tell you not to hit a lady?”

original: Before you can formulate an answer, the dragon-woman draws a device and throws it on the floor between you. It detonates on impact, causing thick clouds of oily black smoke to billow out and fill the room. You cough, waving your hands around your face.
